mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (sender_id, receiver_id, content, send_time, is_read) VALUES (#{query.senderId}, #{query.receiverId}, #{query.content}, NOW(), COALESCE(#{query.isRead}, false))
mapper.select: SELECT id, sender_id as senderId, receiver_id as receiverId, content, send_time as sendTime, is_read as isRead FROM chat_message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{otherUserId}) OR (sender_id = #{otherUserId} AND receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY send_time ASC

SELECT cs.id as sessionId, CASE WHEN cs.user_id1 = #{userId} THEN cs.user_id2 ELSE cs.user_id1 END as otherUserId, u.nick_name as otherUserName, u.avatar as otherUserAvatar, cm.content as lastMessage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND sender_id = CASE WHEN cs.user_id1 = #{userId} THEN cs.user_id2 ELSE cs.user_id1 END AND is_read = false) as unreadCount, DATE_FORMAT(cs.update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updateTime FROM chat_session cs LEFT JOIN user u ON u.user_id = CASE WHEN cs.user_id1 = #{userId} THEN cs.user_id2 ELSE cs.user_id1 END LEFT JOIN chat_message cm ON cm.id = cs.last_message_id WHERE cs.user_id1 = #{userId} OR cs.user_id2 = #{userId} ORDER BY cs.update_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET is_read = true WHERE sender_id = #{otherUserId} AND receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = false
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND sender_id = #{otherUserId} AND is_read = false

SELECT id, sender_id as senderId, receiver_id as receiverId, content, send_time as sendTime, is_read as isRead FROM chat_message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY send_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = false
